editor.title: AliveNpcs - Personality Manager
editor.description: Edit NPC personalities, lore, and character data used by AliveNpcs AI dialogue. Changes take effect on the next conversation.
editor.select_prompt: Click on an NPC to edit their personality and character data.
field.personality.tooltip: Describe {{npcName}}'s personality, traits, and behavior for the AI.
field.lore.tooltip: Background lore that is appended to the personality in the AI prompt.
field.social_tags.tooltip: Comma-separated social tags (e.g. outgoing, introverted, prankster).
field.submission_credit.tooltip: Attribution credit for community-submitted NPC profiles.
field.character_data.locked: Enable Character Data in the mod config (GMCM) to edit these fields.
gallery.warning.title: Character Data change
gallery.warning.character_data: This preset changes the character's game data (name, gender, romance, and so on). These override the base game and can conflict with other mods. Continue?
field.restore.tooltip: Check and save to remove custom personality and restore the original.
farmer.field.2: Why did you move to the valley?
farmer.field.3: What else should they know about you?
farmer.field.4: Optional: What is most striking about you?
gallery.preset.applied: Preset applied for {{npcName}}. Click Save to commit.
gallery.config.server_url.tooltip: Server URL for the community personality gallery.
gallery.config.enabled.tooltip: Show gallery tab and upload buttons in the editor.
gallery.config.description: Connect to a community server to share and download personality presets.
gallery.title: Personality Gallery
gallery.upload.info: To upload a personality preset to the gallery, open any NPC's edit modal, customize their personality, then click the 'Upload to Gallery' button at the bottom right of the edit window.
gallery.upload.hint: You can also save presets locally using the 'Save Preset' button in the edit modal, then browse and apply them anytime via 'Browse Presets'.
gallery.upload.no_presets: No local presets. Save presets from the NPC edit modal first.
